title: 2013 Census definitions and forms | Stats NZ
content:
## 2013 Census definitions and forms
05 November 2013, 10:45am
This page provides definitions of terminology used in outputs from the 2013 Census of Population and Dwellings, held on Tuesday, 5 March 2013. It is part of a reference series for census data users that provides information about the data produced.
The first part provides definitions of output variables and terms used in 2013 Census outputs. The definitions are presented in six groups: personal, family, household, dwelling, geographic, and general. Within each group, the items are in alphabetical order.
The final chapter, 'Census questions, dates, and forms', provides links to an index of questions asked in the census over time, a list of dates when national and provincial censuses were held, and images of the forms from the 2013 Census and censuses dating back to 1906, where available.
- 2013 Census definitions and forms Adobe Acrobat PDF file, 715 KB
